[[Corellian Personal Defense/Legends|Corellian Personal Defense's]] '''"Big Shock"''' was a webbed lacing that could be applied to the surfaces of many types of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] suits. It created a shock field that was powerful enough to damage objects or beings that came into contact with the armor. A smaller version, called a [[Shock glove/Legends|shock glove]], was also available.<ref name="OBA" />

{{Tech-stub}}
